moneyBackGuarantee.headline: 30-Day Money-Back Guarantee
moneyBackGuarantee.description: Our plan is backed by a money-back guarantee. We believe that our plan will work for you, so we guarantee a full refund within 30 days after purchase if you don't see visible results in your ability to manage dopamine-driven habits despite following your plan as directed.

questions.question: What if my willpower is gone? I've tried to quit before and failed.
questions.answer: This plan isn't another test of willpower. Instead, it's designed to teach you the skills to manage urges and rebuild your brain's reward system from the ground up. We help you build new patterns gradually, so you don't have to rely on willpower alone to succeed.

questions.question: What if my triggers are everywhere and I can't escape them?
questions.answer: Compass focuses on helping you build resilience. You'll learn practical, in-the-moment strategies to identify your triggers, navigate cravings when they strike, and redirect your focus without feeling overwhelmed. The goal isn't to eliminate triggers, but to take away their power over you.

questions.question: What if I'm afraid I'll just fail again?
questions.answer: Compass is different because it breaks the journey into small, manageable daily steps that are easy to follow. You're not alone in this. We provide constant support and guidance to help you build momentum, celebrate small wins, and stay motivated even when it feels hard.

questions.question: Is my data private?
questions.answer: Yes, we take your privacy seriously. All data is encrypted with 256-bit SSL and is never shared with third parties. Your personal information stays completely confidential.

testimonials.title: Concise and easy
testimonials.content: Concise and easy. Those are the action words that are needed when you're trying to detox your dopamine dependence. Really glad to try this.
testimonials.author: Michael T.

testimonials.title: Finally taking control of my screen time
testimonials.content: Before I started using Compass, I used to procrastinate a lot. Now I feel like I can finally start breaking away from bad habits. The daily check-ins are a game changer.
testimonials.author: James R.

testimonials.title: Compass is like a personal coach
testimonials.content: It's convenient to have everything in one place and I don't have to look for other resources. The personalized approach made all the difference. Definitely worth it.
